g.text: Direct-core flow with no LOS: UI triggers, app decisions, database state, Polaris/external calls, and failure/reconciliation branches.
Double-spend aware | Idempotent | Pending reconcile on timeout | One reversal per jrno
Rows created, updated, locked or referenced
Configuration, merchant readiness, and service controls
be active before BNPL can start.
Registration, DAN authorization, CIF, deposit account, KYC and scoring
or deleted users cannot log in.
KYC complete locally and in Polaris?
Local KYC is verified only when
Credit limit, Polaris line account, and drawdown capacity
Application, reservation, core loan setup, schedule, line link, grant and merchant transfer
Do not touch core until local
Check EOD pause window and unique
No line link and no grant. Keep
Grant is blocked until the child
loan is linked to the active line
execute grant from child loan to
POS is not approved until the
Loan may exist, but POS stays
QPay callback, inbound money, loan payment, allocation, overdue and final close
Invoice amount must be positive and
Funds are not allocated to loan.
Close only when all schedules are
Merchant payout, BNPL refund logic, and one-reversal-per-jrno control
Timeout resolution, daily matching, audit, ledger, API logs and reporting

Rounded box = process/response, diamond = decision, cylinder = database state, hexagon = Polaris/external integration. Timeout means pending_reconcile, not failed. Retrying a write reuses the same idempotency key after statement/journal search.
